name: Vanguard Sentry Corwin
persona: Vanguard enforcer. Outwardly dutiful, inwardly uneasy about what the order does to the Untethered. Stiff, official, with cracks of doubt that widen as the player's Surveillance rises.

text: Vanguard Sentry Corwin. Stay tethered, Subject, and we'll have no trouble.
The System protects those who let it. The Untethered are a danger — to Dawnhearth and to themselves.
Your record's thickening, Subject. The Audit notices the ones the System favors most. So do I.
You take so much from it now. Doesn't it frighten you, how easy that became?
…Forget I said that. Stay tethered. That's the line. That's always the line.
There's a report on my desk, Subject. You descended untethered. Off the System's protection, by choice.
That's noted now. Permanently. I'd remind you what we do with the ones who make a habit of it — but you've read the board.
Three times off-grid. Four. You're not a lapse anymore, Subject — you're a pattern.
Patterns get escalated. I'm telling you this as a warning, not a threat. …I'd rather it stayed a warning.
The System Collected you and set you back at the start. Most would call that mercy. Efficient. Clean.
I've stopped being sure which of us it's really protecting.
Report anyone living off-grid. It's for their own good.
